title: SAMPLE 1 — Eva spicy face
prompt: Tight close-up in @costco-aisle on @Eva's face. She holds a tiny paper sample cup near her mouth, just took a bite. A beat. Her cheeks flush ENGINE RED, eyes water, nostrils flare, mouth pinched closed in polite forced-smile horror. Eva (squeaky strangled voice): "...mmm. Yummy." Eva (small whimper): "...water." Eva (one tear escaping): "...so spicy." Solo shot — only Eva's face and shoulders visible, no other people, no other faces.
